name: Spiced Mocha Mix
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Instant coffee granules or crystals
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl or container, combine all ingredients and mix well.
2. Store the mix in a tightly covered container.
To serve:
1. Spoon 3 Tablespoons of the mix into a mug.
2. Add 1 cup of boiling water and stir to blend.
3. If desired, garnish with a dollop of sour cream.
4. To create a gift, fill a half-pint jar. Attach an attractive bow and label with directions.
